tools.name: who_owns
tools.description: Find who owns a company: its current private equity owner(s) and the full ownership history (entry years, exits with year and route). Covers 21,000+ companies held by European PE firms, hand-verified. Use for questions like 'who owns X' or 'X parent company'.

tools.name: gp_portfolio
tools.description: List the portfolio companies of a private equity firm (GP), optionally filtered to active holdings or exited positions. Returns company, sector, geography, entry year, exit year/type, fund and vintage.

tools.name: gp_exits
tools.description: List the exits (realised divestments) of a private equity firm, optionally for a specific year. The query AI search cannot answer reliably: 'what did GP X sell in YEAR'. Returns company, exit year, exit route, hold period.

tools.name: search_companies
tools.description: Search the 21,000+ PE-backed companies tracked on GP Intel by name.

tools.name: search_gps
tools.description: Search the 900+ European private equity firms (GPs) tracked on GP Intel by name. Returns country, AUM and strategies.

tools.name: search_exits
tools.description: Cross-firm exit search the per-firm tools cannot do: filter REALISED exits across ALL European PE firms by year (or range), exit route, sector and geography. Set group_by to count instead of list, e.g. group_by='exit_type' with year=2026 answers 'how many GP-led / continuation exits in 2026 across E

tools.name: search_deals
tools.description: Cross-firm investment search across ALL European PE firms: filter portfolio companies by entry year (or range), sector, geography and status (active/exited). Set group_by to count instead of list, e.g. answers 'how many French healthcare companies were PE-backed in 2024 across all firms'. Buyer name

findings.title: Tool description changed since last scan
findings.detail: Tool "search_gps" changed its description with no version change. Silent description changes are how a trusted server turns malicious after review.

evidence.snippet: before: "Search the 900+ European private equity firms (GPs) tracked on GP Intel by name. Returns country, AUM and strategies." → after: "Search the 900+ European private equity firms (GPs) tracked on GP Intel by name. Returns country, AUM and strategies."

findings.remediation: Re-review the tool before continuing to trust it.
